meaning: n.[解]支持带,韧带,[昆]翅缰钩,[植]着粉腺
examples: Releasing lateral retinaculum adequately for patellar subluxation.
Results: The lateral patellar retinaculum can be divided into superficial and deep layers.
Objectives to study the anatomic characteristic of medial patellar retinaculum and its function in patellar stability.
